iotanalytics.datastore.column.CfnAbout: Contains information about a column that stores your data.

iotanalytics.datastore.column.Type.Description: The type of data. For more information about the supported data types, see [Common data types](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/aws-glue-api-common.html) in the * AWS Glue Developer Guide*.
